headline: Block And Uber Tie Up Connects Cash App And Square To Everyday Spending
summary: Block (NYSE:XYZ) announced a global partnership with Uber, expanding Square’s native integration with Uber Eats into new international markets. The agreement also introduces Cash App Pay as a payment option for U.S. users on both Uber and Uber Eats. This move connects Block’s point of sale tools and digital wallet with one of the largest food delivery and ride hailing platforms worldwide. For investors watching Block at a current share price of $72.5, this partnership comes alongside double...

headline: This fintech firm is replacing their workers with AI
summary: While AI was supposed to make our lives easier, it seems it might make it harder to get a job and make a living. AI use has skyrocketed and with it, some jobs are being eliminated. And it seems nearly every sector is being impacted. Snap announced on April 15 that it was cutting 1,000 jobs, ...
